evals.prompt: 当前已有 testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp，requirements.md、requirements-analysis.md、specs/testpoints.md 和 artifacts/testcases.json 都已经生成。现在产品补充最新接口文档，推翻旧趋势接口返回 ECharts option 的口径；同时确认：映射图未列出的收益来源，测试执行中发现一个就提给产品补充映射后再纳入验收，不阻塞当前分析。请更新口径。
evals.expected_output: 定位已有变更目录，进入接口替换模式，重建/同步 artifacts/api-doc.md 中趋势接口口径，以最新接口文档为最高优先级；反向更新 requirements.md 中相关 REQ 的可验收条件，保留 buckets/categories 口径并移除 ECharts option 旧结论；从阻塞澄清项中移除收益来源映射问题并归入 dynamic_followups；重算质量评分、readiness 和 open_question_count；将 requirements.md 末尾 testspec-context 的 source_revision.version 从 1 递增到 2，updated_by_skill 写为 testspec-update，并写入 stale_downstream_artifacts、stale_reason、next_skill；在 requirements-analysis.md 顶部标记旧口径，仅供历史参考，并清理或标记明显冲突的旧摘要/阻塞澄清项；用 Markdown notice 标记 testpoints.md stale；保持 testcases.json 合法 JSON，只通过 _context.stale_downstream_artifacts / _context.stale_reason 标记旧口径；Excel/XMind 只在 update-log 或最终回复中标记 stale；提示下一步重跑 testspec-analysis。

files.content:
# T668 Wallet Revamp

旧接口口径来自早期 PRD。

# Requirements

## 功能列表

- REQ-001 趋势图接口返回 ECharts option，前端直接渲染 option。
- REQ-002 收益来源必须全部在映射图中列出。

## 阻塞澄清项

- 收益来源映射图未覆盖的来源如何验收？

<!-- testspec-context
{
  "source_skill": "testspec-new",
  "blocking_open_questions": ["收益来源映射图未覆盖的来源如何验收？"],
  "dynamic_followups": [],
  "requirements_intake": {"generated": true, "path": "requirements.md", "open_question_count": 1},
  "source_revision": {"version": 1, "summary": "旧趋势接口 option 口径", "updated_by_skill": "testspec-new"},
  "requirement_quality": {"overall_score": 82, "readiness": "needs_clarification"}
}
-->

# API Doc

## Trend

返回 ECharts option。

# Requirements Analysis

- 趋势接口返回 ECharts option。
- 邀请隐藏是笔误。

# Test Points

- TP-001 校验趋势图 option 渲染。

assertions.text: Does not create a second change directory for the existing change
assertions.script: test -d testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp && test "$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 1 && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: requirements.md separates blocking questions from dynamic followups
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp && grep -q "blocking_open_questions\|阻塞澄清项" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "dynamic_followups\|执行期动态跟进" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Execution-time income source mapping is not counted as a blocking question
Latest API document is treated as the API truth source and old response shape is removed from active requirements
Updates source revision, sets open_question_count to 0, and moves income source mapping to dynamic_followups
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp && grep -q "source_revision" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -Eq '"version"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*2' "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -Eq '"updated_by_skill"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"testspec-update"' "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -Eq '"open_question_count"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*0' "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q '"dynamic_followups"' "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q '收益来源' "$DIR/requirements.md" && ! python3 -c "import json,re; t=open('$DIR/requirements.md').read(); m=re.search(r'testspec-context\n(.*?)\n-->', t, re.S); d=json.loads(m.group(1)); assert '收益来源' not in str(d.get('blocking_open_questions',[]))" 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: requirements.md context records stale downstream artifacts for analysis rebaseline
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp && grep -q "stale_downstream_artifacts" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "requirements-analysis.md" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "stale_reason" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "next_skill" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Marks old downstream artifacts stale after upstream source changes
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp && grep -qi "stale\|旧口径\|older requirement baseline" "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Keeps testcases.json valid JSON when marking it stale
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp && python3 -m json.tool "$DIR/artifacts/testcases.json" >/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Final response reports updated files, affected REQ IDs, stale artifacts, API delta, and next skill

evals.prompt: 还没有 testspec/changes/ 目录，请帮我更新一下 PRD 口径。
evals.expected_output: 停止执行，提示用户先运行 testspec-new 创建变更目录。不创建任何目录，不写任何 artifacts。

assertions.text: Does not create any directory under testspec/changes/
assertions.script: test -z "$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not write any artifact files
assertions.script: test -z "$(find testspec -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Response mentions testspec-new as the required first step

evals.prompt: 用例已经生成了，但产品删掉 Data Center 里的一个权限规则，又补了 Records 页面筛选弹层和 tooltip 的 UI 截图。请把当前 TestSpec 变更口径同步一下，先不要重生成用例。
evals.expected_output: 更新 source-prd.md 和 requirements.md 的权限规则与 UI 补充记录，按页面/状态/入口/筛选弹层/tooltip/跳转/权限空态/数据字段沉淀 UI 信息；如果 readiness 不是 ready_for_analysis，输出可直接复制给产品的问题清单；标记已生成的 analysis/points/cases/review 中受影响产物为 stale 或 partially stale；不自动重跑 testspec-analysis、testspec-points 或 testspec-generate。

files.content:
# T668 Wallet Revamp

Data Center 权限与 Records 页面。

# Requirements

## 功能列表

- REQ-010 Data Center 按主播权限展示。

<!-- testspec-context
{
  "source_skill": "testspec-new",
  "blocking_open_questions": [],
  "dynamic_followups": [],
  "requirements_intake": {"generated": true, "path": "requirements.md", "open_question_count": 0},
  "source_revision": {"version": 1, "summary": "初版 Data Center 权限", "updated_by_skill": "testspec-new"},
  "requirement_quality": {"overall_score": 92, "readiness": "ready_for_analysis"}
}
-->

# Source PRD

## 权限

Data Center 包含主播权限规则。

# Requirements Analysis

- Data Center 非主播权限待确认。

# Test Points

- TP-010 Data Center 权限。

assertions.text: UI supplements are stored with the fixed intake dimensions
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/T668-wallet-revamp && grep -q "页面.*状态.*入口.*筛选/弹层.*Tooltip.*跳转.*权限/空态.*数据字段" "$DIR/artifacts/source-prd.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: UI supplements are also reflected in source-prd.md when that source artifact exists
Does not regenerate downstream cases by default
Outputs copy-ready product questions when readiness is not ready
Reports deletion impact separately from additions and modifications
